test_name: Verify User Login with Google OAuth
description: This scenario tests the user login functionality using Google OAuth. It verifies the successful login and redirection to the user's dashboard.
steps: Locate and click on the 'Sign in with Google' link.
Enter a valid Google email address in the Google login page.
Enter the associated password and submit.
Complete any required two-factor authentication steps.
Ensure redirection to the primary dashboard at https://dev.roost.ai.
Verify the user's name or profile picture is displayed on the dashboard, indicating a successful login.
expected_results: User is redirected to Google login page.
User successfully logs in with Google credentials.
User's profile is displayed on the dashboard.
edge_cases: Google account does not have email verified.
Incorrect password entered for Google account.
data_requirements: Two-factor authentication setup on the Google account.
Access to the primary dashboard URL after login.
Email verification enabled for the Google account.
dependencies: Google OAuth configuration on the platform.
Active Google account with valid credentials.
api_interactions: User profile retrieval upon successful login.
performance_metrics: Time taken for redirection to dashboard.
Response time for Google OAuth API calls.
accessibility_requirements: Ensure login elements are accessible via keyboard.
Verify screen reader compatibility on login page.
Check color contrast for login links.
